evals.prompt: Review the code on this branch
evals.expected_output: A structured code review report with pass history showing iterative review-fix cycles, applied fixes, and a final Rails-worthy verdict
expectations: The review identifies files changed on the current branch vs main
The review invokes the dhh-code-reviewer agent at least once
The review runs Rubocop on the changed files
The review auto-applies Critical and Major fixes without asking the user
The review runs tests after applying fixes to verify nothing broke
The review performs at least 2 passes (initial review + verification pass)
The final report includes a Pass History section showing each iteration
The final report includes an Applied Fixes section listing what was changed
The review exits when Rails-worthy verdict is reached or max passes hit
The state file .omc/state/dhh-review-state.json is cleaned up at the end

evals.expected_output: A review of only the staged git changes, with iterative fix loop
expectations: The review scopes to staged files only (git diff --staged --name-only)
The review does not review unstaged or untracked files
The review follows the same iterative review-fix loop as a branch review
The final report correctly identifies the scope as staged changes

evals.expected_output: A review of all model files in the directory
expectations: The review scans all Ruby files in app/models/
The review checks for concerns usage, proper scopes, and callback patterns
The review identifies anemic models if present
The review auto-applies fixes and verifies with tests
